title: Infinite execution loop with Gmail Get Many Messages
symptom: The workflow keeps executing indefinitely due to the same set of emails being returned each time.
applies_when: Using Gmail Trigger for unread emails
Using Gmail Get Many Messages node
not_this_if: Using a static date in the Received After field
root_cause: The expression used in the Received After field recalculates to the current date each time the workflow runs, causing the same emails to be fetched repeatedly, which triggers the workflow again.
fix_steps: Add a Remove Duplicates node after the Gmail Trigger node
Select the option 'Remove Items processed in previous executions' in the node settings
Save the workflow and test it again
agent_instruction: Insert a Remove Duplicates node after the Gmail Trigger to prevent re-processing of the same emails.
